blocks.text: Yamal's hat trick fires Barcelona — now rain fights for the Grand Final
Arsenal lead at 61pts, but Liverpool's 5-2 demolition of West Ham and Haaland's injury cloud over City (56pts) make Sunday's Chelsea-Arsenal derby appointment viewing.

blocks.label: 🎮 DraculaN Season 5 Finals — rain's day
items: 14:00 — FlyQuest vs 100 Thieves — rain must win to reach the Grand Final
18:30 — HEROIC await the Grand Final — rematch on if 100T survive
